description: As a Clinical Data Manager, configure the randomization structure for the Phase II Diabetes Trial (DM-TRIAL-2024) in OpenClinica (Credentials: root / Admin123!). Create a Subject Group Class named 'Treatment Arm' with the type 'Arm'. The class must include three specific groups: 'Metformin 500mg' (Description: Active treatment arm receiving metformin 500mg twice daily), 'Metformin 1000mg' (Description: Active treatment arm receiving metformin 1000mg twice daily), and 'Placebo' (Description: Placebo control arm receiving matching placebo twice daily).

groups.name: Metformin 500mg
groups.description: Active treatment arm receiving metformin 500mg twice daily

groups.name: Metformin 1000mg
groups.description: Active treatment arm receiving metformin 1000mg twice daily

groups.name: Placebo
groups.description: Placebo control arm receiving matching placebo twice daily
